examples: When the time is up, refocus on your next task.
People can revisit and refocus an image, days, months, even years later.
Policymakers who refocus efforts on improving well-being rather than simply worrying about GDP figures could avoid the forecasted doom and may even see progress.
Obama will try to refocus an increasingly apathetic and controversy-weary U.S. public on security issues.
As companies downsize, restructure and refocus, employees are asked to do more and work harder.
